# Pull request

Describe the user-visible problem and the final behaviour.

## Contracts and architecture

Describe any affected CLI, Profile, output, exit-code, lockfile, security, or package-boundary
contracts.

## Verification

List the commands run and the observed results.

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make build`

## Migration

Describe any migration required for consuming repositories, or write `None`.

## Contribution provenance

- [ ] I disclosed all third-party material, including its source, copyright owner, and licence.

Provide details below, or write `None`.

## Contributor licence agreement

The automated CLA Assistant status check must pass before this pull request can be merged.
